LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.descriptio: A bandoleer often worn by NCR troopers. It's used to store ammunition as well as personal trinkets or talismans.
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Bandoleer.label: Trooper Bandoleer
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.description: A simple mantle made from heavy fabrics. NCR officers often strap these to their shoulder. It doesn't offer much protection but insulates fairly well.
LanguageData.FCP_Accessories_NCR_Mantle.label: Trooper Mantle
